description: A passenger with dietary restrictions needs to request a vegetarian meal for their long-haul flight.

nodes.task_description: Check if the flight and fare type are eligible for complimentary meal service.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the flight is eligible.

nodes.task_description: Add the Special Service Request (SSR) code for a vegetarian meal (VGML) to the booking.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully adds the meal request to the booking.
